author: gb9t
content: Iter 55 result: virt/kvm/x86-mmu-page-track.md (KVM page-tracker - page_track.c ~374; per-VM gfn-track-mode counter + SRCU notifier list + KVMGT/nested-virt write-monitor; integrates with shadow MMU pte-write + supports WRITE/ACCESS modes) + kernel/rcu/tree.md (Tree-RCU - tree.c ~4931 + tree_plugin.h + tree_exp.h + tree_nocb.h + tree_stall.h; multi-level rcu_node tree + per-CPU rcu_data + GP state machine + segmented cb_list + NOCB offload + expedited-GP + CPU-stall watchdog). Pivoted second slot from intel-debugfs to kernel/rcu/tree.md (much higher-value foundational kernel infrastructure used everywhere). 60 Tier-3s total. Next iter: kernel/rcu/srcu.md + virt/kvm/x86-pmu.md (architectural perfmon).
